overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city center, featuring the distinctive neon-soaked aesthetic of Cyberpunk 2077. The player character moves along rain-slicked sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements, passing street vendors and pedestrians in the dense urban environment of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street corner with crosswalk and neon signage

events.description: begins walking forward from the street corner toward the crosswalk
pedestrians visible crossing the street ahead at the zebra crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk approaching a crosswalk, observing the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and the Orbital Air sign

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive red hair walking past on the left side

entered.detail: large green neon corporate sign mounted atop a skyscraper, clearly visible against the night sky
yellow and black striped construction barrier at the street corner
zebra crossing with yellow stripes spanning the multi-lane road
modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a downtown street corner at night, with the iconic green Orbital Air neon sign dominating the skyline ahead. The camera moves forward along the rain-slicked sidewalk toward a crosswalk, passing a pedestrian with red hair. Yellow construction barriers line the left side while towering glass buildings frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with street vendors

events.description: enters covered area beneath massive concrete overpass with large support pillars
passes by food vendor stalls with accumulated garbage bags piled on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating under the overpass, walking between concrete pillars and past street vendors

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete support columns for the overhead highway structure
street food cart with red and white color scheme and illuminated signage
piles of blue and white plastic trash bags accumulated near the vendor stall
illuminated vertical billboard displaying a person's face in advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, where huge concrete pillars line the path. The lighting becomes a mix of neon and artificial overhead lights. Street vendors operate food stalls on the right, with piles of garbage bags visible nearby. The environment feels more enclosed and urban compared to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown boulevard with traffic barriers and corporate towers

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open street with expansive view of the city skyline
dark sedan with headlights on drives past on the multi-lane road to the right

agents.ego_description: emerging from the overpass onto the open boulevard, continuing along the sidewalk with orange barriers to the right

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the road with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: orange metal railings separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the vehicle road
futuristic building with large RC logo and distinctive circular neon rings near the top
overhead expressway structure with vehicles visible on the upper level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass, the scene opens into a wide downtown boulevard with an expansive view of the neon-lit skyline. The RC building with its distinctive circular neon rings becomes visible in the distance. Orange traffic barriers line the right side of the sidewalk, and vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road. The camera makes a slight right turn to follow the curved sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown boulevard with heavy corporate advertising

events.description: slight adjustment in walking path to navigate around other pedestrians on the sidewalk
multiple vehicles with headlights pass by on the right side road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the broad sidewalk, observing the towering neon advertisements and city architecture while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

entered.detail: massive screen displaying colorful advertisements with green and red neon elements
futuristic street lamps with horizontal light bars spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: This long segment features a steady walk along the main downtown boulevard, with the RC building growing larger on the right side. Massive digital billboards with vibrant neon advertisements dominate the left side of the view. The sidewalk is moderately populated with pedestrians walking in both directions, and a steady stream of vehicles passes by on the right. Futuristic street lights with horizontal bars illuminate the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and steam vents

events.description: steam or smoke rising from street vents becomes visible ahead, creating atmospheric effect
approaches and steps onto the zebra crossing to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, navigating through the crowd, and stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction toward the far sidewalk

entered.detail: street vent emitting white steam or smoke, creating a atmospheric cyberpunk effect
yellow striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
tall pole with traffic signals and attached signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy intersection marked by rising steam from street vents, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere. The camera moves toward and onto the zebra crossing, joining other pedestrians in crossing the multi-lane street. The RC building and large digital billboards fall behind as the scene focuses on the crosswalk and the steam-veiled street ahead. Traffic lights and orange barriers line the crossing area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk downtown that shifts from an open street corner into a claustrophobic underpass before expanding into a grand, neon-lit boulevard. It begins at a street corner beneath a towering green Orbital Air sign, moving past a red-haired pedestrian and yellow construction barriers toward a crosswalk. As the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, the environment becomes enclosed and gritty, passing concrete pillars and food stalls flanked by piles of garbage. The scene then opens back into a wide boulevard where the view expands to reveal the circular neon rings of the RC building and massive digital billboards that dominate the skyline. Finally, the camera follows the curved sidewalk toward a busy intersection, moving through rising steam from street vents and onto a zebra crossing as the towering architecture recedes into the misty urban haze.
